## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual smoke test completed (if UI behavior changed)

## Risk & Rollback

- Risk level: low / medium / high
- Rollback plan:

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Error handling added/updated for new logic
- [ ] Documentation updated (README/docs/CHANGELOG) when needed
- [ ] Tests added or updated for changed behavior
